caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, a green t-shirt, and headphones sits before a professional microphone in a room decorated with framed photos on the wall and clothing racks in the background. His t-shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" in a stylized white font. In the background, a white mannequin stands beside black chairs. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular "BONE" logo on the left and a red "BONE" logo on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking into the microphone. His facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, moving from an open-mouthed expression to a slight smile and then back to speaking. The camera remains static, capturing his head and shoulders as the scene progresses with minimal movement other than his natural speaking gestures.
